questions.question: Why did Vue 2's global API (Vue.component, Vue.use) prevent tree-shaking?
options: Vue 2 used CommonJS modules which cannot be statically analyzed
Importing Vue pulled in the entire runtime since the bundler couldn't know what Vue.use() would access
Vue 2 components used dynamic imports by default
Vue 2's template compiler included all features in the bundle unconditionally
